highlights.text: I wrote back on Sunday (when we were 5960s) that the “Bear case Monday: The real bear case begins if 5870-75 fails.” Why 5875?
We then spent Monday evening back-testing 5875ish and I wrote Monday at 4pm that: “ Bear case tomorrow: Resumes under 5850.” Why 5850 this time?
I wrote yesterday my general lean was “that ES can try another crack at 5858 then 5875.
Remember that after every “elevator down” selloff in ES comes a short squeeze.

post_title: Rare Green Day For SPX, But Will It Get Sold Like The Others? March 6 Plan
